data.name: Msg_ConfirmDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this record?

data.name: Msg_NotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: Msg_LoginRequired
data.value: You must log in to continue.

data.name: Val_PasswordLength
data.value: The password must be at least {0} characters.

data.name: Val_Range
data.value: The value must be between {0} and {1}.

data.name: Val_MinLength
data.value: The field must be at least {0} characters.

data.name: Val_MaxLength
data.value: The field must be at most {0} characters.

data.name: Auth_LogOffConfirm
data.value: Do you want to log out?

data.name: Auth_LogoutQuestion
data.value: Do you want to end your session?

data.name: Footer_About_Text
data.value: Concierge Costa Rica is a concierge services company founded by three friends with a shared passion and commitment to deliver unique experiences and tailored solutions for our clients.

data.name: CS_AboutCompany_P1
data.value: Concierge Costa Rica is a services company committed to delivering unique experiences and tailored solutions for our clients.

data.name: Contact_Lead
data.value: We’ll be happy to help you plan your perfect experience in Costa Rica.

data.name: FAQ_Lead
data.value: Find answers to the most common questions about our services

data.name: About_Team_Lead
data.value: Meet the people behind our commitment to excellence in personalized service.

data.name: About_Company_P1
data.value: Concierge Costa Rica is a concierge services company founded by three friends with a shared passion and commitment to deliver unique experiences and tailored solutions for our clients.

data.name: CS_Airfare_Desc
data.value: We help you search and compare the best airfares based on your dates and destination.

data.name: CS_LuxuryGround_Desc
data.value: We provide high‑end vehicles with professional drivers for your transfers.

data.name: CS_VIPFastTrack_Desc
data.value: Skip lines and slow processes with our VIP service at key airports such as San José, Guanacaste, and Turks & Caicos.

data.name: CS_YachtCharter_Desc
data.value: Enjoy the ocean in total privacy aboard fully equipped luxury yachts.

data.name: CS_PrivateTours_Desc
data.value: We arrange unique experiences, from nature adventures to exclusive cultural tours.

data.name: CS_PrivateJetHeli_Desc
data.value: Travel in style and on your schedule across Costa Rica with our private aircraft.

data.name: CS_PrivateChefs_Desc
data.value: Gourmet chefs available in Costa Rica, Tulum, and Turks & Caicos to create custom menus in your villa.

data.name: CS_RestaurantRes_Desc
data.value: Priority access and assistance booking the best local restaurants.

data.name: CS_ShoppingProvision_Desc
data.value: Arrive to a fully stocked villa with food, drinks, and essentials tailored to your preferences.

data.name: CS_VillaRental_Desc
data.value: An exclusive selection of villas in Costa Rica, Riviera Maya, and Turks & Caicos for a luxury stay.

data.name: CS_InHomeSpa_Desc
data.value: Spa and wellness treatments in your accommodation with certified professionals.

data.name: Home_CTA_Lead
data.value: Contact us to plan your luxury experience

data.name: Home_Intro_Title
data.value: Your personalized experience in Costa Rica

data.name: Home_Intro_Paragraph
data.value: At {0}, we offer an elite service to help you with restaurant reservations, purchase event tickets, plan your dream vacations, arrange everything you need for business activities worldwide, locate hard-to-find items, as well as purchase and deliver special gifts. The cost of goods or services is billed to your Platinum MasterCard.

data.name: Home_Service_General_Desc
data.value: Car and limousine rentals, specialty stores, product research, and more.

data.name: Home_Service_Cultural_Desc
data.value: Events, local and international attractions, protocol and etiquette guidelines.

data.name: Home_Service_Restaurants_Desc
data.value: Bookings at fine-dining restaurants, menu information, dress code, and more.

data.name: Home_Service_Entertainment_Desc
data.value: Access to concerts, theater, opera, museums, and sporting events.

data.name: Home_Service_Business_Desc
data.value: Translators, interpreters, technology rentals, and business travel information.

data.name: Home_Service_Golf_Desc
data.value: Reservations and suggestions at public and private courses in major cities.

data.name: Home_Service_Recreation_Desc
data.value: Outings, sports, sightseeing, gym referrals, and more.

data.name: Home_Service_Gifting_Desc
data.value: Flowers, gift baskets, balloons, and personalized gifts domestically and internationally.

data.name: Home_Service_UniqueItems_Desc
data.value: Sourcing hard-to-find items such as art, rare books, or unique objects.

data.name: About_Company_P2
data.value: With years of experience in hospitality, customer service, logistics and corporate event management, we joined forces to build a company based on trust, dedication and attention to detail.

data.name: About_Company_P3
data.value: Our company is more than a business; it reflects our friendship and commitment to delivering exceptional service that simplifies our clients’ lives.

data.name: About_Company_P4
data.value: We specialize in offering a wide range of services not only in Costa Rica but also in other key destinations: private transportation, in‑home chefs, reservations and special events, as well as handling day‑to‑day tasks that make life easier and more enjoyable.

data.name: About_Testimonial_1_Text
data.value: “The best experience of my life. Concierge Costa Rica took care of everything, from airport pickup to a romantic dinner on the beach.”

data.name: About_Testimonial_2_Text
data.value: “Professional, punctual and exquisitely attentive. Highly recommended for anyone seeking the very best on their vacation.”

data.name: About_Testimonial_3_Text
data.value: “They helped me get VIP tickets to an exclusive event in Tulum. Everything was perfect.”

data.name: About_CTA_Title
data.value: Ready to live an unforgettable experience?

data.name: FAQ_Featured_WhatIs_Desc
data.value: Personalized service to handle your daily and special needs.

data.name: FAQ_Featured_HowRegister_Desc
data.value: You only need your email and password to get started.

data.name: FAQ_Featured_PaymentMethods_Desc
data.value: We accept cards and bank transfers securely.

data.name: FAQ_General_Q1_Body
data.value: The Concierge service provides personalized assistance—reservations, arrangements and tailored recommendations.

data.name: FAQ_General_Q2_Title
data.value: How do I register on the platform?

data.name: FAQ_General_Q2_Body
data.value: Click "Sign Up" in the top menu, fill out the form with your details, and confirm your account from the email we send you.

data.name: FAQ_Bookings_Q1_Title
data.value: Can I modify or cancel my booking?

data.name: FAQ_Bookings_Q1_Body
data.value: Yes. In your dashboard you'll find the "Edit" and "Cancel" options next to each confirmed booking.

data.name: FAQ_Bookings_Q2_Title
data.value: How do I receive my booking confirmation?

data.name: FAQ_Bookings_Q2_Body
data.value: Once confirmed, we'll email you all the details.

data.name: FAQ_Payments_Q1_Title
data.value: What payment methods do you accept?

data.name: FAQ_Payments_Q1_Body
data.value: We accept credit/debit cards and bank transfers. All payments are processed securely.

data.name: FAQ_Payments_Q2_Title
data.value: Can I get an invoice or receipt?

data.name: FAQ_Payments_Q2_Body
data.value: Yes. After payment, the invoice will be sent to your registered email.

data.name: FAQ_Help_Lead
data.value: Our Concierge team is ready to help with any personalized request.

data.name: Contact_Placeholder_Message
data.value: Tell us how we can help…

data.name: Services_Intro_Lead
data.value: Below are all our concierge services, organized by country to deliver a personalized experience based on your destination.

data.name: Services_Helicopter_Desc
data.value: Arrive at your destination in style and speed. Perfect for avoiding traffic or enjoying panoramic views.

data.name: Services_SailingCatamaran_Desc
data.value: Sail comfortably and safely on daytime or sunset excursions.

data.name: Services_FloralDecoration_Desc
data.value: Beautify your home or event with unique, fresh floral arrangements.

data.name: Services_SpanishTeacher_Desc
data.value: Personalized classes for all levels from the comfort of your accommodation.

data.name: Services_ReceptionWelcome_Desc
data.value: We welcome your guests, show them the property and answer questions for a smooth check-in.

data.name: Services_PropertyInspection_Desc
data.value: We verify everything is in order before your arrival at the rental property.

data.name: Services_ProfessionalPhotography_Desc
data.value: Capture your best moments with high-quality images by expert photographers.

data.name: Services_BartenderMixologist_Desc
data.value: Take your events to the next level with custom cocktails crafted by experts.

data.name: Services_Butler_Desc
data.value: Experience the ultimate in personalized service with our professional butler services. From managing your daily schedule to attending to your needs, we ensure a flawless stay.

data.name: Locations_Intro_Lead
data.value: Learn the details of each of our featured destinations.

data.name: Locations_CR_Content
data.value: With its forests and beaches, Costa Rica is home to abundant natural beauty. The country has more than 25 National Parks and over 20 protected areas, making it perfect for nature lovers and outdoor adventurers.

data.name: Locations_RivieraMaya_Content
data.value: Beautiful beaches, the rich legacy of the Maya World, exotic nature, world-class hotels and resorts, top gastronomy and a super fun nightlife make Mexico’s Caribbean the perfect place for your next vacation.

data.name: Locations_Bahamas_Content
data.value: The Bahamas are a tropical paradise with idyllic beaches, crystal-clear waters and warm weather year-round—perfect for relaxing, enjoying water activities and exploring the local culture.

data.name: Locations_TurksCaicos_Content
data.value: In this British Overseas Territory—put on the map by celebrity vacations—turquoise waters, underwater life and shells take center stage. You’ll also find a national-treasure dolphin and one of the best beaches in the world.

data.name: Locations_Miami_Summary
data.value: Vibrant, cosmopolitan and full of energy.

data.name: Locations_Miami_Content
data.value: Miami is a vibrant city where Latin culture meets American modernity. It offers iconic beaches like South Beach, street art in Wynwood, top-tier nightlife and a constantly evolving food scene—ideal for those seeking luxury, entertainment and a cosmopolitan seaside vibe.

data.name: Reservations_Hero_Lead
data.value: Check your current bookings or make a new one.

data.name: Reservations_View_Desc
data.value: See the history of your bookings, with options to modify or cancel when needed.

data.name: Reservations_New_Desc
data.value: Book a new service tailored to your destination, service type, and available time.

data.name: Services_VillaRental_Desc
data.value: Curated luxury villas for your stay.

data.name: Services_VillaRental_Desc_MX
data.value: Luxury properties in the Riviera Maya.

data.name: Services_CardSelect_Hint
data.value: Tap or click the cards to select services.

data.name: Services_FilterCountry_Hint
data.value: Choose a country to see only the services available for that destination.

data.name: Confirm_CancelBooking
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel this booking?

data.name: Register_Lead
data.value: Fill out the form to create your account.

data.name: Services_SelectDesired_Hint
data.value: Select the desired services (existing ones will remain selected).
